name: Docker Compose Configuration
description: Create docker-compose.yml and docker-compose.override.yml for web, api, db, and redis services.

name: Linter & Prettier Configuration
description: Create ESLint and Prettier configuration files at root and within workspaces.

name: CI/CD Workflows
description: Create GitHub Actions pipelines for linting, testing, and deploying frontend and backend services.

name: Railway App Configuration
description: Create Railway app config and settings files for service deployments.

name: Local Dev Bootstrap Script
description: Create setup.sh script to bootstrap docker, databases, and dependencies.

name: Next.js Workspace Setup
description: Scaffold apps/web with layout, globals.css, and tsconfig.

name: FastAPI App Skeleton Setup
description: Create apps/api/main.py, config, database, and requirements.txt.

name: Database Schema Scaffolding
description: Define database models, schemas, and configure Alembic migration environment.
